title: FirmaCivPlus
description: An Addon for FirmaCiv and TerraFirmaCraft adding cross compatibility with other TFC addons such as ArborFirmaCraft and Beneath
body:
# FirmaCiv+
An addon for [Firma: Civilization](https://modrinth.com/mod/firmaciv) which adds Cross Compatibility with other TerraFirmaCraft Addons, such as [ArborFirmaCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/arborfirmacraft-(afc)) and [Beneath](https://modrinth.com/mod/beneath)

![FirmaCiv+ Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4134ee8dd14f0e0bdc8fbd6499acd4753d3cfc89.png)


(Curseforge mirror [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/firmacivplus))
# Features
* Support the creation of Canoes, Rowboats and Sloops utilizing the External Mod's Wood Types
* Implementation of a Dedicated Roofing block for Building
* Patchouli Entries to immersively display which kinds of wood can be used to make Canoes, Rowboats and Sloops

# Supported Mods
Below is a section of supported mods by FirmaCivPlus, click the Collapsable Header to reveal a table of Wood to the available ships you can create with it

<details>
<summary>ArborFirmaCraft</summary>

| Wood | Wood Type | Available Watercrafts |
|--|--|--|
| Tualang | Softwood | Canoe |
| Cypress | Softwood | Canoe |
| Fig | Softwood | Canoe |
| Baobab | Hardwood | Rowboats and Sloops |
| Eucalyptus | Hardwood | Rowboats and Sloops |
| Mahogany | Hardwood | Rowboats and Sloops |
| Hevea | Hardwood | Rowboats and Sloops |
| Teak | Hardwood | Rowboats and Sloops |
| Ironwood | Hardwood | Rowboats and Sloops |
| Ipe | Hardwood | Rowboats and Sloops |

Go to [ArborFirmaCraft's Page](https://modrinth.com/mod/arborfirmacraft-(afc))
</details>

<details>
<summary>Beneath</summary>

| Wood | Wood Type | Available Watercrafts |
|--|--|--|
| Crimson | Softwood | Canoe |
| Warped | Hardwood | Rowboats and Sloops |

# DISCLAIMER:
Despite both Crimson and Warped Stems being part of the Beneath, Watercrafts made out of these woods are ***__NOT__*** lava reistant! (This is an unfinished feature from the parent mod Alekiships)

Go to [Beneath's Page](https://modrinth.com/mod/beneath)
</details>

Don't see a TerraFirmaCraft addon here? Let me know which mod you'd like to see supported by contacting me in the official [TerraFirmaCraft discord server](https://discord.gg/PRuAKvY)!

# Future Versions

I began playing TerraFirmaCraft by playing the modpack [TerraFirmaGreg-Modern](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/terrafirmagreg-modern), the desire to deprecate a mod within said modpack brought me to create FirmaCivPlus, to add support for both AFC and Beneath as a result.

This mod was originally an addition to said modpack's "Core" mod, after consideration, i decided to release it publicly

Future versions past 1.20 are not a promise, especially considering that there's a chance that FirmaCiv/Alekiships will become fully *Data Driven*, letting you add new Watercrafts using Datapacks.

# Can I use this in my mod pack?

I literally made FirmaCivPlus to be used in a Modpack called TerraFirmaGreg-Modern, so yes, feel free to use it!

# Special Thanks

* Traister101, for helping me out getting started, general guidance and just being insanely helpful
* Alekiponi, for creating FirmaCiv/Alekiships, and Convincing me to release this mod standalone
